# update

**Instance Method**

Updates one or more existing records.

## Declaration

```swift
CloudKit.RecordsBatchBuilder update(
	CloudKit.Record|CloudKit.Record[] records,
	optional Object options
);
```

## Parameters

- **records**: A [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Record] dictionary representing the fields of the record you want to update, if you are updating a single record. If you are updating multiple records, this parameter is an array of [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Record] dictionaries. The [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Record] dictionaries need to contain the `recordChangeTag` key. Only the values of the fields in these dictionaries are updated.
- **options**: A dictionary containing options for this operation. This parameter contains a single `desiredKeys` key that is an array of field names (`String` values). Only the fields specified in the array are set.

## Return Value

The object that received this method call.

## Creating and Updating Records

- **create**: Creates one or more records.
- **createOrUpdate**: Creates or updates one or more records depending on the information provided.
- **forceUpdate**: Updates one or more existing records regardless of conflicts.
